question: How many times have I worn my new black Converse Chuck Taylor All Star sneakers?
reasoning_summary: Two memories mention worn counts: one says 4 times (m_7a9f2b24e0ed1fbd4283) and another says 6 times (m_38e896e86744d61b72a6). The latter is from a later timestamp in the same session, so it supersedes the earlier count. Therefore, the user has worn the sneakers 6 times as of the question date.

conflicts.resolution: The memory stating 4 times is from an earlier time (2023-05-30) and is superseded by the later memory stating 6 times (also 2023-05-30 but later in the same session). The later memory explicitly says 'sixth time' and is more recent.
